productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Barricade Team Black Sports Shoes
description: With these men's adidas Barricade Team 2 shoes, your speed on the court will come close to the speed of the ball coming off your racquet. That's because these tennis shoes have adiPrene+ in the forefoot for propulsion, Torsion System midfoot support and a grippy adiWear 6 outsole. Upper Perforated synthetic upper for dry comfort and durability adiPrene+ in the forefoot maintains propulsion and efficiency miCoach compatible Comfortable textile lining Lace-ups for better Fit Iconic three stripes symbolising the challenges that are seen ahead and goals that can be achieved on the sides Padded collar and tongue and textile shoe lining for better comfort Midsole Molded EVA insole for anatomical comfort Torsion System for better surface adaptation and stability adiPrene insert in the heel for comfort and shock absorption adiPrene+ offers full-length forefoot cushioning Outsole adiPrene under the heel for superior cushioning at impact adiWear non-marking rubber outsole in a modified herringbone tread pattern with pivot point. Shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth Do not machine wash
